spec_preview:
---- MODULE PrimaryBackup ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N >= 1

VARIABLES primary, backups, state, lastAcked

vars == <<primary, backups, state, lastAcked>>

Init ==
    /\ primary = 0
    /\ backups = <<>>  \* Sequence of backup IDs
    /\ state = <<>>     \* Sequence of operations
    /\ lastAcked = 0

Next ==
    \/ \E op \in Nat :
        /\ primary = 0
        /\ state' = Append(state, op)
        /\ backups' = backups
        /\ lastAcked' = lastAcked
    \/ \E b \in Nat : \E op \in Nat :
        /\ primary > 0
        /\ b \in backups
        /\ state' = Append(state, op)
        /\ backups' = backups
        /\ lastAcked' = lastAcked
    \/ \E b \in Nat :
        /\ primary > 0
        /\ b \in backups
        /\ state' = state
        /\ backups'

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ATM ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, card, pin, amount, dispensed

(* State machine states *)
Idle == state = "Idle"
CardInserted == state = "CardInserted"
PINEntered == state = "PINEntered"
Dispensing == state = "Dispensing"
Done == state = "Done"

(* ATM actions *)
InsertCard(cardNumber) == 
    /\ Idle
    /\ state' = "CardInserted"
    /\ card' = cardNumber
    /\ pin' = ""
    /\ amount' = 0
    /\ dispensed' = 0

EnterPIN(pinNumber) == 
    /\ CardInserted
    /\ state' = "PINEntered"
    /\ pin' = pinNumber
    /\ amount' = 0
    /\ dispensed' = 0

EnterAmount(amountNumber) == 
    /\ PINEntered
    /\ state' = "Dispensing"
    /\ amount' = amountNumber
    /\ dispensed' = 0

DispenseCash == 
    /\ Dispensing
    /\ state' = "Done"
    /\ d

spec_preview:
---- MODULE SimpleAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

RequestPage(c) == /\ free /= {}
                  /\ c \in Clients
                     /\ ~(c \in DOMAIN allocated)
                  /\ free' = free \ {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}
                     /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}]
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<free>>

ReleasePage(c, p) == /\ c \in DOMAIN allocated
                     /\ p \in allocated[c]
                  /\ free' = free \cup {p}
                     /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<free>>

Next == \E c \in Clients :

---- MODULE TicketDispenser ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES ticket, counter



TypeOK == /\ ticket \in Nat
          /\ counter \in Nat

Init == /\ ticket = 0
        /\ counter = 0

TicketStep == /\ ticket' = ticket + 1
             /\ counter' = counter

CounterStep == /\ ticket' = ticket
             /\ counter' = counter + 1

Next == TicketStep \/ CounterStep

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ticket, counter>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, CS
ASSUME N \in Nat \land N > 0
ASSUME CS \subseteq 1..N

VARIABLES token, cs

TokenRing == 
    /\ token \in 1..N
    /\ cs \subseteq CS
    /\ Cardinality(cs) <= 1

Init == 
    /\ token = 1
    /\ cs = {}

Next == 
    /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
    /\ cs' = IF token \in CS THEN {token} ELSE {}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, cs>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ token \in 1..N
    /\ cs \subseteq CS
    /\ Cardinality(cs) <= 1

====

                     /\ rumor' = rumor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>>
  /\ writer_active = 0

ReadAcquire == 
  /\ writer_active = 0
  /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReadRelease == 
  /\ Len(readers) > 0
  /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

WriteAcquire == 
  /\ Len(readers) = 0
  /\ writer_active' = 1
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

WriteRelease == 
  /\ writer_active = 1
  /\ writer_active' = 0
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == 
  \/ ReadAcquire
  \/ ReadRelease
  \/ WriteAcquire
  \/ WriteRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES buffer, readPtr, writePtr

(* Type definitions *)
Buffer == [0..N-1 -> 0..N-1]
Ptr == 0..N-1

(* Helper functions *)
NextPtr(p) == IF p = N-1 THEN 0 ELSE p + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ buffer = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> i]
        /\ readPtr = 0
        /\ writePtr = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Read operation *)
           /\ writePtr # readPtr
           /\ readPtr' = NextPtr(readPtr)
           /\ buffer' = buffer
        \/ (* Write operation *)
           /\ writePtr' = NextPtr(writePtr)
           /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![writePtr] = writePtr]
        \/ (* No operation *)
           /\ buffer' = buffer
           /\ readPtr' = readPtr
           /\ writePtr' = writePtr

spec_preview:
---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES buf, rptr, wptr

TypeOK == 
    /\ buf \in Seq(N)
    /\ rptr \in 1..N
    /\ wptr \in 1..N

Init == 
    /\ buf = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ rptr = 1
    /\ wptr = 1

IsFull == 
    /\ wptr = rptr
    /\ buf[wptr] # 0

IsEmpty == 
    /\ wptr = rptr
    /\ buf[wptr] = 0

Write(x) == 
    /\ IsFull = FALSE
    /\ buf' = Append(Head(Tail(buf)), x)
    /\ wptr' = IF wptr = N THEN 1 ELSE wptr + 1
    /\ rptr' = rptr

Read == 
    /\ IsEmpty = FALSE
    /\ buf' = Append(Head(Tail(buf)), 0)
    /\ rptr' = IF rptr = N THEN 1 ELSE rptr + 1
    /\ wptr' = wptr

Next == 
    \/ \E x \in 1..N : Write(x)
    \/ Read

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buf, rptr, wptr>>

====

---- MODULE LeaseProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES lease, leaseHolder, leaseExpiry, time

LeaseDuration == 10

Init == 
    /\ lease = 0
    /\ leaseHolder = {}
    /\ leaseExpiry = 0
    /\ time = 0

Acquire(node) == 
    /\ lease = 0
    /\ leaseHolder' = node
    /\ leaseExpiry' = time + LeaseDuration
    /\ lease' = 1
    /\ time' = time

Release(node) == 
    /\ leaseHolder = node
    /\ lease' = 0
    /\ leaseHolder' = {}
    /\ leaseExpiry' = 0
    /\ time' = time

Wait(node) == 
    /\ leaseHolder # node
    /\ time' = time + 1
    /\ lease' = lease
    /\ leaseHolder' = leaseHolder
    /\ leaseExpiry' = leaseExpiry

Next == 
    \E node \in DOMAIN leaseHolder :
        \/ Acquire(node)
        \/ Release(node)
        \/ Wait(node)

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == /\ readers \in Nat
          /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadAcquire == /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReadRelease == /\ readers > 0
              /\ readers' = readers - 1
              /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

WriteAcquire == /\ writer_active = FALSE
               /\ readers = 0
               /\ writer_active' = TRUE
               /\ UNCHANGED readers

WriteRelease == /\ writer_active = TRUE
               /\ writer_active' = FALSE
               /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == ReadAcquire \/ ReadRelease \/ WriteAcquire \/ WriteRelease

spec_preview:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, known

VARIABLE infected

Init == /\ infected = <<>> \* Initially no node is infected
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : i \in known

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ i \in infected
          /\ \E j \in 1..N :
                /\ ~(j \in infected)
                /\ infected' = Append(infected, j)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected>>

TypeOK == /\ infected \subseteq 1..N
          /\ Len(infected) <= N

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE SimpleAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init ==
  /\ free = Pages
  /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Request(c) ==
  /\ free /= {}
  /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}]
     /\ free' = free \ {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<free, allocated>>

Release(c) ==
  /\ allocated[c] /= {}
  /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = {}]
     /\ free' = free \cup allocated[c]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<free, allocated>>

Next == \E c \in Clients : Request(c) \/ Release(c)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ free \subseteq Pages
  /\ allocated \subseteq [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
  /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages

=

spec_preview:
---- MODULE GossipRumor ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, MaxRounds

VARIABLES known, round

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {i}]
        /\ round = 0

Next == /\ round < MaxRounds
        /\ LET
              i == CHOOSE i \in 1..N : TRUE
              j == CHOOSE j \in 1..N : j # i
              newKnown == known[i] \cup known[j]
           IN
              known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = newKnown, ![j] = newKnown]
        /\ round' = round + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, round>>

TypeOK == /\ known \in [1..N -> SUBSET 1..N]
          /\ round \in Nat

====

---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == 
  /\ readers \in Nat
  /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadAcquire == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReadRelease == 
  /\ readers > 0
  /\ readers' = readers - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

WriteAcquire == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

WriteRelease == 
  /\ writer_active = TRUE
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == 
  \/ ReadAcquire
  \/ ReadRelease
  \/ WriteAcquire
  \/ WriteRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES num, flag

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
    /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ LET maxNum == Max(Seq(num))
           IN num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PrimaryBackup ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES primary, backups, log, nextOpId

vars == <<primary, backups, log, nextOpId>>

Init ==
  /\ primary = 0
  /\ backups = [i \in 1..N-1 |-> 0]
  /\ log = <<>>
  /\ nextOpId = 1

PrimaryAccept(op) ==
  /\ primary = 0
  /\ log' = Append(log, op)
  /\ nextOpId' = nextOpId + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED backups

BackupAccept(i, op) ==
  /\ primary = 0
  /\ backups' = [backups EXCEPT ![i] = op]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<log, nextOpId>>

Next ==
  \/ \E op \in Seq(1..N) : PrimaryAccept(op)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N-1 : \E op \in Seq(1..N) : BackupAccept(i, op)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
  /\ primary \in Nat
  /\ backups \in [1..N-1 -> Nat]
  /\ log \in Seq(Nat)
  /\ nextOpId \in Nat

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)

(* State: state[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init ==
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry"
Eating(i) == state[i] = "eating"
Thinking(i) == state[i] = "thinking"

Free(i) == forks[i] = i

CanEat(i) == Free(Left(i)) /\ Free(Right(i))

TakeForks(i) ==
  /\ forks'[Left(i)] = i
  /\ forks'[Right(i)] = i
  /\ state'[i] = "eating"

PutForks(i) ==
  /\ forks'[Left(i)] = Left(i)
  /\ forks'[Right(i)] = Right(i)

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
    /\ readers = <<>>
    /\ writer_active = 0

AcquireRead == 
    /\ writer_active = 0
    /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
    /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReleaseRead == 
    /\ Len(readers) > 0
    /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
    /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

AcquireWrite == 
    /\ Len(readers) = 0
    /\ writer_active' = 1
    /\ UNCHANGED readers

ReleaseWrite == 
    /\ writer_active = 1
    /\ writer_active' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == AcquireRead \/ ReleaseRead \/ AcquireWrite \/ ReleaseWrite

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES buf, rptr, wptr

BufSize == N
BufRange == 0 .. N-1

BufType == [i \in BufRange |-> 0 .. 9]
BufInit == [i \in BufRange |-> 0]
BufFull == [i \in BufRange |-> 0]
BufEmpty == [i \in BufRange |-> 0]

TypeOK == /\ buf \in BufType
          /\ rptr \in BufRange
          /\ wptr \in BufRange

Init == /\ buf = BufInit
        /\ rptr = 0
        /\ wptr = 0

Write == /\ buf' = [buf EXCEPT ![wptr] = 1]
          /\ wptr' = (wptr + 1) % N
          /\ rptr' = rptr

Read == /\ buf' = [buf EXCEPT ![rptr] = 0]
        /\ rptr' = (rptr + 1) % N
        /\ wptr' = wptr

Next == Write \/ Read

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buf, rptr, wptr>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES buffer, r, w

(* buffer is a sequence of length N, each element is either 0 or 1 *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ buffer \in Seq(N)
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : buffer[i] \in {0,1}
    /\ r \in 1..N
    /\ w \in 1..N

Init == 
    /\ buffer = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ r = 1
    /\ w = 1

Next == 
    (* write a 1 at position w, then advance w *)
    \/ /\ buffer' = Append(Tail(buffer), 1)
        /\ w' = IF w = N THEN 1 ELSE w + 1
        /\ r' = r
    (* read a 1 at position r, then advance r *)
    \/ /\ buffer' = Append(Tail(buffer), 0)
        /\ r' = IF r = N THEN 1 ELSE r + 1
        /\ w' = w

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, r, w>>

====

---- MODULE Door ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, door

DoorStates == {"Open", "Closed", "Locked"}

Door == [state : DoorStates, door : DoorStates]

DoorInit == 
  /\ state = "Closed"
  /\ door = "Closed"

DoorNext == 
  \/ /\ state = "Closed" /\ door = "Closed" /\ door' = "Locked" /\ state' = "Locked"
  \/ /\ state = "Locked" /\ door = "Locked" /\ door' = "Closed" /\ state' = "Closed"
  \/ /\ state = "Closed" /\ door = "Closed" /\ door' = "Open" /\ state' = "Open"
  \/ /\ state = "Open" /\ door = "Open" /\ door' = "Closed" /\ state' = "Closed"

Spec == DoorInit /\ [][DoorNext]_<<state, door>>

====

---- MODULE PrimaryBackup ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES primary, backups, pending, log, next

vars == <<primary, backups, pending, log, next>>

Init == /\ primary = 0
        /\ backups = <<[i \in 1..N-1 |-> 0]>>
        /\ pending = <<[i \in 1..N-1 |-> <<>>]>>
        /\ log = <<>>
        /\ next = 1

PrimaryRequest == /\ primary = 0
                 /\ pending[1] = Append(pending[1], next)
                 /\ next' = next + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<backups, log>>

BackupRequest == /\ primary \in 1..N-1
                /\ pending[primary] = Append(pending[primary], next)
                /\ next' = next + 1
                /\ UNCHANGED <<primary, log>>

PrimaryReply == /\ primary = 0
               /\ pending[1] = <<>>
               /\ log'

spec_preview:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks are represented as a set of indices {1, ..., N} indicating which forks are currently free. *)
(* State is a mapping from philosopher indices to their current state: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating". *)

TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \subseteq 1..N
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Init == 
    /\ forks = 1..N
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == 
    /\ state[i] = "hungry"
    /\ LeftFork(i) \in forks
    /\ RightFork(i) \in forks

TakeForks(i) == 
    /\ forks' = forks \ {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ATM ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, card, pin, balance

(* State definitions *)
Idle == state = "Idle"
CardInserted == state = "CardInserted"
PINEntered == state = "PINEntered"
Dispensing == state = "Dispensing"
Done == state = "Done"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = "Idle"
        /\ card = {}
        /\ pin = {}
        /\ balance = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ (* Insert card *)
        /\ Idle
        /\ card' = Append(card, "CardInserted")
        /\ pin' = {}
        /\ balance' = 0
        /\ state' = "CardInserted"
    \/ (* Enter PIN *)
        /\ CardInserted
        /\ pin' = Append(pin, "PINEntered")
        /\ state' = "PINEntered"
    \/ (* Dispense cash *)
        /\ PINEntered
        /\ balance' = 100

vars == <<time, history>>

TypeOK == /\ time \in 0..MAX
          /\ history \in Seq(0..MAX)

  /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active>>

  /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active>>

  /\ writer_active = FALSE

WriteGrant == 
  /\ Len(readers) = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE

WriteRelease == 
  /\ writer_active = TRUE
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Next ==

  \/ ReadGrant
  \/ ReadRelease
  \/ WriteRequest
  \/ WriteGrant
  \/ WriteRelease

  /\ waitingReaders \in Int
  /\ waitingWriters \in Int

  /\ waitingReaders >= 0
  /\ waitingWriters >= 0

  /\ (writers = 1 => waitingReaders = 0 /\ readers = 0)

  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writers = 0
  /\ waitingReaders = 0
  /\ waitingWriters = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ readers' = readers
     /\ writers' = writers
     /\ waitingReaders' = waitingReaders
     /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

---- MODULE SimpleCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes

(* State can be "init", "vote", "commit", "abort" *)
Init == 
    /\ state = "init"
    /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "none"]

Vote(p, v) == 
    /\ state = "vote"
    /\ v \in {"yes", "no"}
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = v]
    /\ state' = IF v = "no" THEN "abort" ELSE state

Commit == 
    /\ state = "vote"
    /\ \A p \in Participants: votes[p] = "yes"
    /\ state' = "commit"

Abort == 
    /\ state = "vote"
    /\ \E p \in Participants: votes[p] = "no"
    /\ state' = "abort"

Next == 
    \E p \in Participants: Vote(p, "yes") \/ Vote(p, "no") \/ Commit \/ Abort

TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in {"init", "vote", "commit", "abort"}
    /\ votes \in [Participan

---- MODULE SimpleCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

Init ==
    /\ participants = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5}
    /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
    /\ decision = "unknown"

RequestVote(p, v) ==
    /\ p \in participants
    /\ v \in {"yes", "no"}
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = v]
    /\ decision' = decision

Decide ==
    /\ decision = "unknown"
    /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "yes"
    /\ decision' = "commit"

Abort ==
    /\ decision = "unknown"
    /\ \E p \in participants : votes[p] = "no"
    /\ decision' = "abort"

Next ==
    \/ \E p \in participants : \E v \in {"yes", "no"} : RequestVote(p, v)
    \/ Decide
    \/ Abort

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision>>

    /\ pa

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ATM ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, card, pin, balance, dispensed



(* State machine specification *)
Idle == state = "Idle"
CardInserted == state = "CardInserted"
PINEntered == state = "PINEntered"
Dispensing == state = "Dispensing"
Done == state = "Done"

(* Actions *)
InsertCard(cardInput) == 
  /\ state = "Idle"
  /\ card' = cardInput
  /\ state' = "CardInserted"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<pin, balance, dispensed>>

EnterPIN(pinInput) == 
  /\ state = "CardInserted"
  /\ pin' = pinInput
  /\ state' = "PINEntered"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<card, balance, dispensed>>

Withdraw(amount) == 
  /\ state = "PINEntered"
  /\ amount \in 1..balance
  /\ dispensed' = amount
  /\ balance' = balance - amount
  /\ state' = "Dispensing"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<card, pin>>

Complete

---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

ChooseNum(i) == LET maxNum == Max(Seq([j \in 1..N |-> num[j]]))
               IN IF maxNum = 0 THEN 1 ELSE maxNum + 1

Init == /\ num = [j \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = ChooseNum(i)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PrimaryBackup ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N > 1

VARIABLES primary, backups, pending, acked

Init ==
    /\ primary = <<>>
    /\ backups = [i \in 1..N-1 |-> <<>>]
    /\ pending = <<>>
    /\ acked = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ pending' = pending
    /\ acked' = acked
    /\ \E op \in 1..N-1 :
        /\ backups'[op] = Append(backups[op], pending)
        /\ pending' = <<>>
    \/ \E op \in 1..N-1 :
        /\ backups'[op] = backups[op]
        /\ pending' = Append(pending, op)
        /\ acked' = Append(acked, op)
    \/ /\ pending' = pending
        /\ acked' = acked
        /\ primary' = Append(primary, pending)
        /\ pending' = <<>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ primary \in Seq(Nat)
    /\ backups \in [1..N-1 -> Seq(Nat)]
    /\ pending \in Seq(Nat)

spec_preview:
---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES buffer, r, w

TypeOK ==
  /\ buffer \in [1..N -> 0..N-1]
  /\ r \in 1..N
  /\ w \in 1..N

Init ==
  /\ buffer = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ r = 1
  /\ w = 1

Next ==
  /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![w] = r]
  /\ r' = IF r = N THEN 1 ELSE r + 1
  /\ w' = IF w = N THEN 1 ELSE w + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, r, w>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PetersonsAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[2], turn>>
        \/ /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], turn>>
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], flag[2], turn>>
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], flag[2], turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag[1], flag[2], turn>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> 
        /\ infected = {}

Next == 
  /\ known' = known
  /\ infected' = infected \cup {i \in 1..N : 
        /\ ~(i \in infected)
        /\ i \in known' 
        /\ \E j \in infected : j \in known' }

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE EventuallyConsistentCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]

Init == /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node:
          /\ \E m \in Node:
            /\ m = n
            /\ counts[n][m] = counts[n][m] + 1
          /\ \A m \in Node:
            /\ m # n
            /\ counts[n][m] = counts[n][m]
          /\ \A m \in Node:
            /\ m # n
            /\ counts[m][n] = counts[m][n]
          /\ \A m \in Node:
            /\ m # n
            /\ counts[m][m] = counts[m][m]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

====

---- MODULE Elevator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES pos, dir, req

Init == 
    /\ pos = 1
    /\ dir = 1
    /\ req = {}

Next == 
    /\ pos' = pos + dir
       /\ pos' \in 1..N
    \/ /\ pos' = pos
       /\ dir' = -dir
       /\ pos' \in 1..N
    \/ /\ pos' = pos
       /\ dir' = dir
       /\ req' = req \ {pos}
    \/ /\ pos' = pos
       /\ dir' = dir
       /\ req' = req \cup {pos}
    \/ /\ pos' = pos
       /\ dir' = dir
       /\ req' = req

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<pos, dir, req>>

---- MODULE PrimaryBackup ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES primary, backups, pending

Init ==
  /\ primary = <<>>
  /\ backups = [i \in 1..N-1 |-> <<>>]
  /\ pending = <<>>

Next ==
  \/ \E op \in 1..N-1 :
       /\ pending = <<>>
       /\ primary' = Append(primary, op)
       /\ backups' = [i \in 1..N-1 |-> Append(backups[i], op)]
       /\ pending' = <<>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N-1 :
       /\ pending = <<>>
       /\ primary' = primary
       /\ backups' = [j \in 1..N-1 |-> IF j = i THEN Append(backups[j], 0) ELSE backups[j]]
       /\ pending' = <<i>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<primary, backups, pending>>

---- MODULE VendingMachine ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Items, Prices

ASSUME
  /\ Items \subseteq Nat
  /\ Prices \subseteq [Items -> Nat]
  /\ \A i \in Items: Prices[i] > 0

VARIABLES balance, inventory, insertedCoins

Init == /\ balance = 0
        /\ inventory = [i \in Items |-> 10]
        /\ insertedCoins = <<>>

InsertCoin == /\ balance' = balance + 1
             /\ insertedCoins' = Append(insertedCoins, 1)
             /\ UNCHANGED <<inventory>>

DispenseItem(item) == /\ balance >= Prices[item]
                    /\ inventory[item] > 0
                    /\ balance' = balance - Prices[item]
                    /\ inventory' = [inventory EXCEPT ![item] = @ - 1]
                    /\ insertedCoins' = <<>>
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<balance>>

  /\ v \in {0, 1}
  /\ proposals' = Append(proposals, <<p, v>>)
  /\ proposals = proposals'

Acceptor(a, n, v) ==
  /\ a \in acceptors
  /\ n \in Nat
  /\ v \in {0, 1}
  /\ promises' = Append(promises, <<a, n, v>>)
  /\ promises = promises'

Learner(l, n, v) ==
  /\ l \in learners
  /\ n \in Nat
  /\ v \in {0, 1}
  /\ learnings' = Append(learnings, <<l, n, v>>)
  /\ learnings = learnings'

Next ==
  \/ \E p \in proposers : \E v \in {0, 1} : Pr

spec_preview:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, MaxVal

ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0 /\ MaxVal \in Nat /\ MaxVal > 0

VARIABLES token, values, inCritical

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ values \in [1..N -> 1..MaxVal]
          /\ inCritical \in 1..N

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ values = [i \in 1..N |-> 1]
        /\ inCritical = 1

Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ values' = [values EXCEPT ![token] = values[token] + 1]
        /\ inCritical' = token

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, values, inCritical>> 

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ParkingLot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES cars, nextCarID

Init == /\ cars = <<>> 
        /\ nextCarID = 1

Enter == /\ nextCarID <= N
        /\ cars' = Append(cars, nextCarID)
        /\ nextCarID' = nextCarID + 1

Leave == /\ Len(cars) > 0
        /\ cars' = Tail(cars)
        /\ nextCarID' = nextCarID

Next == Enter \/ Leave

TypeOK == /\ cars \in Seq(1..N)
        /\ nextCarID \in 1..N+1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<cars, nextCarID>>

====

Next == 
  \/ /\ proposers' = Append(proposers, <<proposal'>>)

  \/ /\ acceptors' = Append(acceptors, <<accept'>>)
      /\ accept' = <<1, 0>>
      /\ proposal' = proposal
      /\ learn' = learn
  \/ /\ learners' = Append(learners, <<learn'>>)

      /\ proposal' = proposal
      /\ accept' = accept

raw_snippet: TLC timed out after 60s (state space likely too large).
spec_preview:
---- MODULE Barrier ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES barrier, count, waiting

Init == /\ barrier = 0
        /\ count = 0
        /\ waiting = {}

Next == \/ /\ count < N
          /\ barrier' = barrier
          /\ count' = count + 1
          /\ waiting' = waiting \cup {count}
      \/ /\ count = N
          /\ barrier' = barrier + 1
          /\ count' = 0
          /\ waiting' = {}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<barrier, count, waiting>>

====

        /\ waiting = <<>>

Next == \/ /\ owner # 0
          /\ owner' = 0

          /\ owner' = Head(waiting)
          /\ waiting' = Tail(waiting)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<owner, waiting>>

---- MODULE ResourceAlloc ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES owner, waiting

Init == /\ owner = 0
        /\ waiting = <<>>

Next == \/ /\ owner # 0
           /\ owner' = 0
           /\ waiting' = Append(waiting, owner)
       \/ /\ owner = 0
           /\ Len(waiting) > 0
           /\ owner' = Head(waiting)
           /\ waiting' = Tail(waiting)
       \/ /\ owner > 0
           /\ owner' = owner
           /\ waiting' = waiting

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<owner, waiting>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ATM ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, card, pin, amount

(* State machine states *)
Idle == state = "Idle"
CardInserted == state = "CardInserted"
PINEntered == state = "PINEntered"
Dispensing == state = "Dispensing"
Done == state = "Done"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = "Idle"
        /\ card = ""
        /\ pin = ""
        /\ amount = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ /\ Idle
     /\ card' = card
     /\ pin' = pin
     /\ amount' = amount
     /\ state' = "CardInserted"
  \/ /\ CardInserted
     /\ card' = card
     /\ pin' = pin
     /\ amount' = amount
     /\ state' = "PINEntered"
  \/ /\ PINEntered
     /\ card' = card
     /\ pin' = pin
     /\ amount' = amount
     /\ state' = "Dispensing"
  \/ /\ Dispensing
     /\ card' =

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ClockSynchronisation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init ==
    /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + 1]
        /\ clocks' = clocks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

====

        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], flag[2]>>
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], flag[2]>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Known

VARIABLE infected

Init == /\ infected = <<{} \in Known>>  \* Initially only node 1 is infected

Next ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ infected[i] = {} \* Node i is not infected
       /\ \E j \in 1..N :
            /\ infected[j] /= {} \* Node j is infected
            /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[j]]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ infected[i] /= {} \* Node i is infected
       /\ \E j \in 1..N :
            /\ infected[j] = {} \* Node j is not infected
            /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![j] = infected[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES buffer, r, w

TypeOK ==
  /\ buffer \in Seq(1..N)
  /\ r \in 1..N
  /\ w \in 1..N

Init ==
  /\ buffer = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ r = 1
  /\ w = 1

Next ==
  \/ /\ buffer[w] = 0
     /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![w] = 1]
     /\ w' = IF w = N THEN 1 ELSE w + 1
     /\ r' = r
  \/ /\ buffer[w] = 1
     /\ buffer' = buffer
     /\ w' = w
     /\ r' = IF r = N THEN 1 ELSE r + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, r, w>> 

====

---- MODULE SimpleCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES participants, coordinator

Init ==
  /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "unknown"]
  /\ coordinator = "unknown"

Vote ==
  /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ participants[p] = "unknown"
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
  \/ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ participants[p] = "unknown"
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator

Commit ==
  /\ \A p \in Participants : participants[p] = "yes"
  /\ coordinator' = "commit"
  /\ participants' = participants

Abort ==
  /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "no"
  /\ coordinator' = "abort"
  /\ participants' = participants

Next ==
  /\ Vote
  \

spec_preview:
---- MODULE SimpleCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

Init ==
  /\ participants = Participants
  /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
  /\ decision = "none"

Vote(p, v) ==
  /\ p \in participants
  /\ v \in {"yes", "no"}
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = v]
  /\ decision' = decision

Decide ==
  /\ decision = "none"
  /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "yes"
  /\ decision' = "commit"

Abort ==
  /\ decision = "none"
  /\ \E p \in participants: votes[p] = "no"
  /\ decision' = "abort"

Next ==
  \/ \E p \in participants: Vote(p, "yes")
  \/ \E p \in participants: Vote(p, "no")
  \/ Decide
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision>>

====

---- MODULE DistLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES lockHolder, waitingQueue

Init == /\ lockHolder = 0
        /\ waitingQueue = <<>>

Next == \/ /\ lockHolder # 0
          /\ lockHolder' = 0
          /\ waitingQueue' = Append(waitingQueue, 0)
        \/ /\ lockHolder = 0
          /\ waitingQueue # <<>>
          /\ lockHolder' = Head(waitingQueue)
          /\ waitingQueue' = Tail(waitingQueue)
        \/ /\ lockHolder # 0
          /\ lockHolder' = lockHolder
          /\ waitingQueue' = waitingQueue

TypeOK == /\ lockHolder \in Nat
          /\ waitingQueue \in Seq(Nat)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<lockHolder, waitingQueue>> ====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PrimaryBackup ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 1

VARIABLES primary, backups, opSeq, opAck

Init ==
    /\ primary = <<>>
    /\ backups = [i \in 1..N-1 |-> <<>>]
    /\ opSeq = <<>>
    /\ opAck = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ opSeq' = Append(opSeq, 1)
    /\ primary' = Append(primary, 1)
    /\ backups' = [i \in 1..N-1 |-> Append(backups[i], 1)]
    /\ opAck' = Append(opAck, 1)

TypeOK ==
    /\ primary \in Seq(Nat)
    /\ backups \in [1..N-1 -> Seq(Nat)]
    /\ opSeq \in Seq(Nat)
    /\ opAck \in Seq(Nat)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<primary, backups, opSeq, opAck>> ====

  /\ primary \in Nat
  /\ backups \in Seq(Nat)
  /\ Len(backups) = N - 1
  /\ state \in Seq(Nat)
  /\ log \in Seq(Nat)
  /\ pending \in Seq(Nat)
  /\ pendingBackup \in Seq(Nat)

  /\ primary = 1
  /\ backups = [i \in 1..N-1 |-> i + 1]
  /\ state = <<>>
  /\ log = <<>>
  /\ pending = <<>>
  /\ pendingBackup = <<>>

Next ==
  \/ /\ primary = 1
      /\ pending = <<>>
      /\ pendingBackup = <<>>
      /\ \E op \in Nat : /\ pending' = <<op>>
                         /\ pendingBackup' = <<>>
                         /\ UNCHANGED <<primary, backups, state, log>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "idle"

Try == \E i \in 1..N :
  /\ state[i] = "idle"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

Critical == \E i \in 1..N :
  /\ state[i] = "trying"
  /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

Exit == \E i \in 1..N :
  /\ state[i] = "critical"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Next == Try \/ Critical \/ Exit

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* States: 0 = thinking, 1 = hungry, 2 = eating *)

Init ==
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) ==
    /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = i
    /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = i

Eat(i) ==
    /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = i
    /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = i
    /\ states[i] = 2

PutDown(i) ==
    /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = i
    /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = i
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = LeftFork(i), ![RightFork(i)] = RightFork(i)]
    /\ UNCHANGED states

TakeLeft(i)

spec_preview:
---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, IDs
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME N > 0
ASSUME IDs \subseteq Nat
ASSUME Cardinality(IDs) = N

VARIABLES leader, ids, state, next

Init == /\ ids = [i \in 1..N |-> IDs[i]]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ leader = 0

Next == \/ /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
          /\ leader = 0
          /\ next = [i \in 1..N |-> ids[i]]
          /\ state' = [i \in 1..N |-> "sent"]
          /\ leader' = 0
        \/ /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "sent"]
          /\ next = [i \in 1..N |-> next[i]]
          /\ state' = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
          /\ leader' = 0
        \/ /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
          /\ next = [i \in 1..N |-> next[i]]
          /\ state' = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

---- MODULE VendingMachine ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet

(* State space *)
State == [balance : Int, inventory : FiniteSet]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ balance = 0
        /\ inventory = {1, 2, 3}  (* Items available *)

(* Accept a coin *)
AcceptCoin == /\ balance' = balance + 1
              /\ inventory' = inventory

(* Dispense an item *)
DispenseItem == /\ balance' = 0
               /\ inventory' = inventory \ {1}  (* Remove item 1 *)

(* Next state *)
Next == AcceptCoin \/ DispenseItem

(* Invariant: balance never negative, inventory always finite set *)
TypeOK == /\ balance \in Int
          /\ inventory \in FiniteSet

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<balance, inventory>>

====

---- MODULE BoundedRetransmissionProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES file, nextChunk, retransmitCount, acked

TypeOK ==
  /\ file \in File
  /\ nextChunk \in 1..Len(file)
  /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
  /\ acked \in 1..Len(file)

Init ==
  /\ file = File
  /\ nextChunk = 1
  /\ retransmitCount = 0
  /\ acked = 1

SendChunk ==
  /\ nextChunk <= Len(file)
  /\ retransmitCount <= MAX_RETRIES
  /\ UNCHANGED <<file, acked>>
  /\ nextChunk' = IF nextChunk <= Len(file) THEN nextChunk + 1 ELSE nextChunk
  /\ retransmitCount' = IF nextChunk <= Len(file) THEN retransmitCount + 1 ELSE retransmitCount

ReceiveAck ==
  /\ nextChunk <= Len(file)
  /\ retransmitCount <= MAX_RETRIES

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PetersonsAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == 
  \/ /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
      /\ turn = 2
      /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
      /\ turn = 1
      /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

    \/ /\ leaseOwner # 0
       /\ leaseExpiration' = leaseExpiration
       /\ lease' = lease
       /\ node' = node
       /\ nodes' = nodes
       /\ time' = time + 1

---- MODULE PetersonsAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn, pc

Init ==
    /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
    /\ turn = 1
    /\ pc = [i \in 1..2 |-> "start"]

Next ==
    \/ /\ pc[1] = "start"
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
       /\ turn' = 2
       /\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![1] = "wait"]
    \/ /\ pc[1] = "wait"
       /\ turn[1] = turn
       /\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![1] = "critical"]
    \/ /\ pc[1] = "critical"
       /\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![1] = "exit"]
    \/ /\ pc[1] = "exit"
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
       /\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![1] = "start"]

    \/ /\ pc[2] = "start"
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
       /\ turn' = 1
       /\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![2] = "wait"]
    \/ /\ pc[2] = "wait"
       /\ turn[2] =

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedRetransmissionProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES senderState, receiverState, retransmitCount

SenderStates == {"Idle", "Transmitting", "WaitingForAck", "Done", "Failed"}
ReceiverStates == {"Idle", "Receiving", "Done"}

Init == /\ senderState = "Idle"
       /\ receiverState = "Idle"
       /\ retransmitCount = 0

SendNextChunk == /\ senderState = "Idle"
                /\ senderState' = "Transmitting"

TransmitChunk == /\ senderState = "Transmitting"
                /\ senderState' = "WaitingForAck"

ReceiveAck == /\ senderState = "WaitingForAck"
             /\ receiverState' = "Done"
             /\ senderState' = "Done"

Retransmit == /\ senderState = "WaitingForAck"
             /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRI

spec_preview:
---- MODULE DekkersAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]

Next == 
    \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ wants[2] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = wants
    \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ wants[2] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
    \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ wants[2] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 2
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
    \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ wants[2] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in 1..2
          /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ wants[1] \in BOOLEAN
          /\ wants[2] \in BOOLE

---- MODULE ReadersWriters ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writers, waitingWriters

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writers = 0
        /\ waitingWriters = 0

ReadLock == /\ readers' = readers + 1
            /\ writers' = writers
            /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

ReadUnlock == /\ readers' = readers - 1
              /\ writers' = writers
              /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

WriteLock == /\ readers' = readers
            /\ writers' = writers + 1
            /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

WriteUnlock == /\ readers' = readers
              /\ writers' = writers - 1
              /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

Next == ReadLock \/ ReadUnlock \/ WriteLock \/ WriteUnlock

TypeOK == /\ readers \in Int
          /\ writer

spec_preview:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, known

VARIABLE infected

Init == /\ infected = <<[node \in 1..N |-> {}]>>
          /\ \A node \in 1..N : known[node] \subseteq 1..N

Next == /\ \E node \in 1..N :
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![node] = infected[node] \cup known[node]]

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedRetransmissionProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES senderState, receiverState, retransmitCount

SenderStates == {"Idle", "Sending", "WaitingAck", "Done", "Failed"}
ReceiverStates == {"Idle", "Receiving", "Done"}

Init ==
  /\ senderState = "Idle"
  /\ receiverState = "Idle"
  /\ retransmitCount = 0

SendChunk ==
  /\ senderState = "Idle"
  /\ senderState' = "Sending"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<receiverState, retransmitCount>>

WaitAck ==
  /\ senderState = "Sending"
  /\ senderState' = "WaitingAck"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<receiverState, retransmitCount>>

ReceiveAck ==
  /\ senderState = "WaitingAck"
  /\ senderState' = "Done"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<receiverState, retransmitCount>>

ReceiveChunk ==
  /\ receiverState = "Idle"
  /\ receiv

---- MODULE DistLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, NodeSet

VARIABLES holder, waiting

Init == /\ holder = 0
       /\ waiting = <<>>

Next == \/ /\ holder # 0
          /\ holder' = 0
          /\ waiting' = Append(waiting, holder)
      \/ /\ holder = 0
          /\ waiting # <<>>
          /\ holder' = Head(waiting)
          /\ waiting' = Tail(waiting)
      \/ /\ holder # 0
          /\ holder' = holder
          /\ waiting' = waiting

TypeOK == /\ holder \in 0..N
         /\ waiting \in Seq(NodeSet)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<holder, waiting>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N, IDs

ASSUME
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ IDs \subseteq 1..N
    /\ Cardinality(IDs) = N

VARIABLES leader, nextLeader, ids

Init ==
    /\ ids = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
    /\ leader = 0
    /\ nextLeader = 0

Next ==
    /\ leader' = nextLeader
    /\ nextLeader' = IF leader = 0 THEN Max(ids) ELSE 0

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<leader, nextLeader, ids>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, known

VARIABLES infected

Init == /\ infected = <<[node \in 1..N |-> {}]>>
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : known[i] \subseteq 1..N

Next ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[i] \cup known[i]]
        /\ \A j \in 1..N \ {i} :
                infected'[j] = infected[j]
  \/ \E i, j \in 1..N :
        /\ i \in known[j]
        /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[i] \cup known[j]]
        /\ \A k \in 1..N \ {i} :
                infected'[k] = infected[k]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected>>

====

---- MODULE DistLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, NodeSet

VARIABLES lockHolder, waitQueue

Init == /\ lockHolder = 0
        /\ waitQueue = <<>>

Acquire(node) == 
    /\ node \in NodeSet
    /\ lockHolder # node
    /\ ~(node \in waitQueue)
    /\ waitQueue' = Append(waitQueue, node)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<lockHolder>>

Release(node) == 
    /\ lockHolder = node
    /\ waitQueue = <<>>
    /\ lockHolder' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<waitQueue>>

AcquireNext == 
    /\ lockHolder = 0
    /\ Len(waitQueue) > 0
    /\ lockHolder' = Head(waitQueue)
    /\ waitQueue' = Tail(waitQueue)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Next == AcquireNext \/ \/ \E node \in NodeSet : Acquire(node) \/ Release(node)

TypeOK == /\ lockHolder \in NodeSet \/ lockHolder = 0

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ATM ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, card, pin, balance, dispensed

(* State machine states *)
Idle == state = "Idle"
CardInserted == state = "CardInserted"
PINEntered == state = "PINEntered"
Dispensing == state = "Dispensing"
Done == state = "Done"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = "Idle"
        /\ card = {}
        /\ pin = {}
        /\ balance = 1000
        /\ dispensed = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ (* Insert card *)
        /\ Idle
        /\ card' = Append(card, "CardInserted")
        /\ state' = "CardInserted"
        /\ pin' = {}
        /\ balance' = balance
        /\ dispensed' = 0
    \/ (* Enter PIN *)
        /\ CardInserted
        /\ pin' = Append(pin, "PINEntered")
        /\ state' = "PINEntered"

          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[2], turn>>
        \/ /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], turn>>
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], flag[2]>>
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], flag[2]>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: mapping from philosopher index to fork owner (or 0 if free) *)
(* States: mapping from philosopher index to state ("thinking", "hungry", "eating") *)

Init ==
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) ==
  /\ states[i] = "hungry"
  /\ forks[i] = 0
  /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = 0
  /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = 0

Eat(i) ==
  /\ states[i] = "hungry"
  /\ forks[i] = 0
  /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = 0
  /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = 0
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LeftFork(i)] = i, ![RightFork(i)] = i]
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  /\

---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j where j is the philosopher holding it *)
(* States: 0 = Thinking, 1 = Hungry, 2 = Eating *)

Init == 
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[Left(i)] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = i

TakeForks(i) == 
    /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = 2]

PutForks(i) == 
    /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = Left(i), ![Right(i)] = Righ

---- MODULE ParkingLot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES parked, nextCarID

Init == /\ parked = <<>> 
        /\ nextCarID = 1

Enter == /\ nextCarID <= N
        /\ nextCarID' = nextCarID + 1
        /\ parked' = Append(parked, nextCarID)

Leave == /\ Len(parked) > 0
        /\ parked' = Tail(parked)
        /\ nextCarID' = nextCarID

Next == Enter \/ Leave

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<parked, nextCarID>>

====

---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N, IDs

VARIABLES leader, candidates



Init == /\ leader = -1
        /\ candidates = [i \in 1..N |-> IDs[i]]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ leader' = IF candidates[i] = Max(candidates) THEN i ELSE leader
          /\ candidates' = [candidates EXCEPT ![i] = IF candidates[i] = Max(candidates) THEN candidates[i] ELSE Max(candidates)]

TypeOK == /\ leader \in 1..N \/ leader = -1
         /\ candidates \in [1..N -> 1..N]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<leader, candidates>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, IDs

ASSUME
  /\ N \in Nat
  /\ N > 0
  /\ IDs \subseteq 1..N
  /\ Cardinality(IDs) = N

VARIABLES leader, state, msg

Init ==
  /\ leader = 0
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
  /\ msg = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ msg[i] = {}
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "sending"]
       /\ msg' = [msg EXCEPT ![i] = {IDs[i]}]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "sending"
       /\ msg[i] = {}
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
       /\ msg' = [msg EXCEPT ![i] = {}]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ msg[i] # {}
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "receiving"]
       /\ msg' = [msg EXCEPT ![i] = {}]
  \/

spec_preview:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes, decided

TypeOK == /\ state \in {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}
          /\ votes \in [1..N -> {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]
          /\ decided \in {"Commit", "Abort", "Pending"}

Init == /\ state = "Init"
        /\ votes = [i \in 1..N |-> "Pending"]
        /\ decided = "Pending"

Prepare == /\ state = "Init"
           /\ state' = "Prepare"
           /\ votes' = [i \in 1..N |-> "Pending"]
           /\ decided' = decided

VoteYes(i) == /\ state = "Prepare"
              /\ votes[i] = "Pending"
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = "Yes"]
              /\ state' = state
              /\ decided' = decided

VoteNo(i) == /\ state = "Prepare"

                /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters
                /\ writer' = writer
                /\ readers' = readers + 1

ReadRelease == /\ waitingReaders' = waitingReaders
                /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters
                /\ writer' = writer
                /\ readers' = readers - 1

WriteAcquire == /\ waitingReaders' = waitingReaders
                /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters - 1
                /\ writer' = 1
                /\ readers' = readers

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

  /\ votedFor = {}

  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :

        /\ newTerm > currentTerm
        /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ newTerm > currentTerm
        /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ newTerm > currentTerm
        /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES buffer, readPtr, writePtr

Init == /\ buffer = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ readPtr = 1
        /\ writePtr = 1

        /\ buffer[writePtr] = 0
        /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![writePtr] = 1]
        /\ readPtr' = readPtr
        /\ writePtr' = IF writePtr = N THEN 1 ELSE writePtr + 1
    \/ /\ writePtr # readPtr
        /\ buffer[writePtr] = 0
        /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![writePtr] = 1]
        /\ readPtr' = readPtr
        /\ writePtr' = IF writePtr = N THEN 1 ELSE writePtr + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, readPtr, writePtr>>

        /\ writePtr = 1

    /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![writePtr] = 1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, readPtr, writePtr>>

---- MODULE GossipRumor ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Rumor

VARIABLES known, rumor

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {i}]
        /\ rumor = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = 1 THEN Rumor ELSE {}]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..N : /\ i \in 1..N
                                 /\ j \in 1..N
                                 /\ rumor[i] \subseteq rumor[j]
                                 /\ known' = known
                                 /\ rumor' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN rumor[i] \cup rumor[j] ELSE rumor[k]]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..N : /\ i \in 1..N
                                 /\ j \in 1..N
                                 /\ rumor[i] \subseteq rumor[j]
                                 /\ known' = known

---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E term \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ \E term \in Nat : \E leader \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

        /\ active' = active

TypeOK == /\ leader \in 0..N
          /\ active \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<leader, active>>

ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES forks, states

TypeOK ==
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
    /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Init ==
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) ==
    forks[i] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)

Eat(i) ==
    /\ forks[i] = i
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutDown(i) ==
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Hungry(i) ==
    /\ stat

(* Forks: mapping from fork index to owner philosopher or "free" *)
(* States: mapping from philosopher index to "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \/ "free"]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Helper functions to get adjacent forks *)
leftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
rightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Helper to check if philosopher i can eat *)
canEat(i) == forks[leftFork(i)] = "free" /\ forks[rightFork(i)] = "free"

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)

spec_preview:
---- MODULE MultiProducerConsumer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES buffer, size, producers, consumer

(* Buffer is a sequence of items, size is its current length *)
Init == /\ buffer = << >>
       /\ size = 0
       /\ producers = 1..5
       /\ consumer = 1

(* Each producer can add an item if buffer not full *)
ProducerAction == \E p \in producers :
  /\ buffer' = Append(buffer, p)
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<consumer>>

(* Consumer removes an item if buffer not empty *)
ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ buffer' = Tail(buffer)
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<producers>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, size, producers, consumer>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedRetransmissionProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES file, sent, acked, retransmitCount

Init == /\ file = File
        /\ sent = <<>>
        /\ acked = <<>>
        /\ retransmitCount = 0

SendNextChunk ==
    /\ Len(file) > Len(sent)
    /\ sent' = Append(sent, Head(Tail(file)))
    /\ acked' = acked
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0

Retransmit ==
    /\ Len(file) > Len(sent)
    /\ sent' = sent
    /\ acked' = acked
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1

ReceiveAck ==
    /\ Len(acked) < Len(sent)
    /\ acked' = Append(acked, Head(sent))
    /\ sent' = sent
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0

Next == SendNextChunk \/ Retransmit \/ ReceiveAck

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, sent, acked, retransmitCount>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PrimaryBackup ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Primary, Backups

VARIABLES state, log, nextIndex

TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
        /\ N >= 1
        /\ Primary \in 1..N
        /\ Backups = {1..N} \ {Primary}
        /\ state \in 1..N
        /\ log \in Seq(1..N)
        /\ nextIndex \in Nat

Init == /\ state = Primary
       /\ log = <<>>
       /\ nextIndex = 1

Next == \/ /\ state = Primary
          /\ nextIndex' = nextIndex + 1
          /\ log' = Append(log, nextIndex)
          /\ UNCHANGED <<state, nextIndex>>
       \/ /\ state \in Backups
          /\ log' = log
          /\ nextIndex' = nextIndex
          /\ UNCHANGED <<state, nextIndex>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, log, nextIndex>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PrimaryBackup ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N >= 2

VARIABLES primary, backups, state

Init ==
  /\ primary = 0
  /\ backups = <<[i \in 1..N-1 |-> 0]>>
  /\ state = <<[i \in 1..N |-> 0]>>

Next ==
  /\ primary' = primary + 1
  /\ backups' = Append(backups, primary')
  /\ state' = Append(state, primary')

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<primary, backups, state>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ primary \in Nat
  /\ backups \in Seq(Nat)
  /\ Len(backups) = N-1
  /\ state \in Seq(Nat)
  /\ Len(state) = N

====

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writers = 0
        /\ waitingWriters = 0

ReadLock == /\ readers' = readers + 1
             /\ writers' = writers
             /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

ReadUnlock == /\ readers' = readers - 1
               /\ writers' = writers
               /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

WriteLock == /\ readers' = readers
             /\ writers' = writers + 1
             /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

WriteUnlock == /\ readers' = readers
               /\ writers' = writers - 1
               /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

Next == ReadLock \/ ReadUnlock \/ WriteLock \/ WriteUnlock

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writ

              /\ v \in {"yes", "no"}
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = v]

          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "yes"
          /\ decision' = "commit"
          /\ state' = "finished"

Abort == /\ state = "voting"
          /\ \E p \in participants : votes[p] = "no"
          /\ decision' = "abort"
          /\ state' = "finished"

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ReadersWriters ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer, waitingWriters

Init == /\ readers = <<>>  /\ writer = 0  /\ waitingWriters = 0

EnterReader == /\ writer = 0
              /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
              /\ writer' = writer
              /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

ExitReader == /\ Len(readers) > 0
             /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
             /\ writer' = writer
             /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

EnterWriter == /\ Len(readers) = 0
              /\ writer = 0
              /\ writer' = 1
              /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

ExitWriter == /\ writer = 1
              /\ writer' = 0
              /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

Next == EnterReader \/ ExitReader \/ EnterWriter

---- MODULE EventuallyConsistentCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts

TypeOK ==
    /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Int]]
    /\ \A n \in Node: \A m \in Node: counts[n][m] \in Nat

Init ==
    /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next ==
    /\ \E n \in Node:
        /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [counts[n] EXCEPT ![n] = counts[n][n] + 1]]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  \* No other variable changes

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE SimpleCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

Init ==
    /\ participants = 1..N
    /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
    /\ decision = "unknown"

Vote(p, v) ==
    /\ v \in {"yes", "no"}
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = v]
    /\ decision' = decision

Decide ==
    /\ decision' = IF \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "yes" THEN "commit" ELSE "abort"
    /\ votes' = votes

Next ==
    \/ \E p \in participants: /\ votes[p] = "unknown" /\ Vote(p, "yes")
    \/ \E p \in participants: /\ votes[p] = "unknown" /\ Vote(p, "no")
    \/ /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] \in {"yes", "no"}
       /\ decision = "unknown"
       /\ Decide

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES buffer, readPtr, writePtr

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ buffer \in Seq(N)
    /\ readPtr \in 1..N
    /\ writePtr \in 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ buffer = <<>>
    /\ readPtr = 1
    /\ writePtr = 1

(* Write operation *)
Write == 
    /\ buffer' = Append(buffer, writePtr)
    /\ writePtr' = IF Len(buffer) = N THEN 1 ELSE writePtr + 1
    /\ readPtr' = readPtr

(* Read operation *)
Read == 
    /\ buffer' = Tail(buffer)
    /\ readPtr' = IF Len(buffer) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE readPtr + 1
    /\ writePtr' = writePtr

(* Next state *)
Next == Write \/ Read

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, readPtr, writePtr>>

====

---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES buffer, r, w

Init == /\ buffer = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ r = 1
        /\ w = 1

Next == \/ /\ r' = r
          /\ w' = IF w = N THEN 1 ELSE w + 1
          /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![w] = 0]
        \/ /\ r' = IF r = N THEN 1 ELSE r + 1
          /\ w' = w
          /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![r] = 1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, r, w>>

====

---- MODULE PetersonsAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

  /\ writer = 0
  /\ waitingWriters = 0
  /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
  /\ writer' = writer
  /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

ReleaseRead ==
  /\ Len(readers) > 0
  /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
  /\ writer' = writer
  /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

AcquireWrite ==
  /\ writer = 0
  /\ Len(readers) = 0
  /\ writer' = 1
  /\ readers' = <<>>
  /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

ReleaseWrite ==
  /\ writer = 1
  /\ writer' = 0
  /\ waitingWriters' = waitingWriters

Next ==
  \/ AcquireRead
  \/ ReleaseRead
  \/ AcquireWrite
  \/ ReleaseWrite

       /\ writers = <<>>

           \/ /\ \E w \in Writers : /\ ~(w \in writers)
               /\ Len(readers) = 0
               /\ writers' = Append(writers, w)
           \/ /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
               /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
           \/ /\ \E w \in Writers : /\ w \in writers
               /\ writers' = Tail(writers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writers>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Known

VARIABLES infected

Init == /\ infected = <<[x \in Known |-> FALSE]>>
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : infected[i] = FALSE

          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => infected'[j] = infected[j]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PetersonsAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[2], turn>>
      \/ /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], turn>>
      \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], turn>>
      \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[2], turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE VendingMachine ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES balance, inventory

(* Constants *)
ITEM_PRICE == 5
MAX_BALANCE == 20

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == /\ balance \in 0..MAX_BALANCE
          /\ inventory \in [Item \in 1..10 |-> 0..100]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ balance = 0
        /\ inventory = [i \in 1..10 |-> 10]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E coin \in 1..5:
    /\ balance' = balance + coin
    /\ inventory' = inventory
  \/ \E item \in 1..10:
    /\ balance >= ITEM_PRICE
    /\ inventory[item] > 0
    /\ balance' = balance - ITEM_PRICE
    /\ inventory' = [inventory EXCEPT ![item] = @ - 1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<balance, inventory>>

====

            /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, rumor>>

---- MODULE DekkersAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == 
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = <<FALSE, TRUE>>
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ wants' = <<TRUE, FALSE>>
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, IDs

ASSUME
  /\ N \in Nat
  /\ N >= 1
  /\ IDs \subseteq Nat
  /\ Cardinality(IDs) = N
  /\ IsFiniteSet(IDs)

VARIABLES leader, candidates

Init == 
  /\ leader = 0
  /\ candidates = IDs

Next == 
  /\ leader' = IF Len(candidates) = 1 THEN Head(candidates) ELSE 0
  /\ candidates' = IF Len(candidates) = 1 THEN {} ELSE Tail(candidates)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<leader, candidates>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE SimpleCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

Init ==
  /\ participants = 1..N
  /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
  /\ decision = "unknown"

Vote(p, v) ==
  /\ p \in participants
  /\ v \in {"yes", "no"}
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = v]
  /\ decision' = decision

Decide ==
  /\ decision' = "commit"
  /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "yes"

Abort ==
  /\ decision' = "abort"

Next ==
  /\ \E p \in participants: Vote(p, "yes") \/ Vote(p, "no")
  \/ /\ decision = "unknown"
     /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "yes"
     /\ Decide
  \/ /\ decision = "unknown"
     /\ \E p \in participants: votes[p] = "no"
     /\ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE SimpleCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES participants, votes, status

Init ==
  /\ participants = 1..N
  /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
  /\ status = "pending"

Vote(p, v) ==
  /\ p \in participants
  /\ v \in {"yes", "no"}
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = v]
  /\ status' = status

Check ==
  /\ status = "pending"
  /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "yes"
  /\ status' = "commit"

Abort ==
  /\ status = "pending"
  /\ \E p \in participants : votes[p] = "no"
  /\ status' = "abort"

Next ==
  /\ \E p \in participants : Vote(p, "yes")
  \/ \E p \in participants : Vote(p, "no")
  \/ Check
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, status>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES buffer, readPtr, writePtr

Init == /\ buffer = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ readPtr = 1
        /\ writePtr = 1

Write == /\ writePtr' = IF writePtr = N THEN 1 ELSE writePtr + 1
        /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![writePtr] = 1]

Read == /\ readPtr' = IF readPtr = N THEN 1 ELSE readPtr + 1
        /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![readPtr] = 0]

Next == Write \/ Read

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, readPtr, writePtr>>

---- MODULE KVStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES store

Init == store = <<>>  (* empty sequence of key-value pairs *)

Next == 
  \/ \E key \in Nat : \E value \in Nat :
        /\ store' = Append(store, <<key, value>>)
  \/ \E key \in Nat :
        /\ store' = [pair \in store |-> IF pair[1] = key THEN <<>> ELSE pair]
  \/ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ReadersWriters ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer = 0

AcquireReader == /\ writer = 0
                /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
                /\ writer' = writer

ReleaseReader == /\ Len(readers) > 0
                /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
                /\ writer' = writer

AcquireWriter == /\ Len(readers) = 0
                /\ writer = 0
                /\ writer' = 1
                /\ readers' = readers

ReleaseWriter == /\ writer = 1
                /\ writer' = 0
                /\ readers' = readers

Next == AcquireReader \/ ReleaseReader \/ AcquireWriter \/ ReleaseWriter

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer>>

====

---- MODULE ReadersWriters ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writers, queue

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>>
  /\ writers = <<>>
  /\ queue = <<>>

Next == 
  \/ /\ queue # <<>>
      /\ queue[1] = "reader"
      /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
      /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
      /\ writers' = writers
  \/ /\ queue # <<>>
      /\ queue[1] = "writer"
      /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
      /\ readers' = <<>>
      /\ writers' = Append(writers, 1)
  \/ /\ readers # <<>>
      /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
      /\ writers' = writers
  \/ /\ writers # <<>>
      /\ writers' = Tail(writers)
      /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writers, queue>>

---- MODULE ParkingLot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES cars, nextCarID

Init == /\ cars = <<>> 
        /\ nextCarID = 1

Enter == /\ nextCarID <= N
        /\ cars' = Append(cars, nextCarID)
        /\ nextCarID' = nextCarID + 1

Leave == /\ cars /= <<>> 
        /\ cars' = Tail(cars)
        /\ nextCarID' = nextCarID

Next == Enter \/ Leave

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<cars, nextCarID>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

        /\ wants \in {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1}

     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = 1]

           /\ waiting' = Tail(waiting)
        \/ /\ owner > 0
           /\ owner' = owner
           /\ waiting' = Append(waiting, owner)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<owner, waiting>>

---- MODULE ReadersWriters ----

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writers = <<>>

Next == \/ /\ Len(writers) = 0
          /\ Len(readers) > 0
          /\ Len(readers') = Len(readers) - 1
             /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
          /\ writers' = <<>>
       \/ /\ Len(readers) = 0
          /\ Len(writers) > 0
          /\ Len(writers') = Len(writers) - 1
             /\ writers' = Tail(writers)
          /\ readers' = <<>>
       \/ /\ Len(readers) = 0
          /\ Len(writers) = 0
          /\ Len(readers') = Len(readers) + 1
             /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
          /\ writers' = <<>>

  \/ /\ \E p \in Participants :

        /\ decision' = decision

        /\ decision = "none"
        /\ decision' = "commit"
        /\ votes' = votes
  \/ /\ \E p \in Participants : votes[p] = "no"
        /\ decision = "none"
        /\ decision' = "abort"
        /\ votes' = votes

---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES buffer, readPtr, writePtr

Init == /\ buffer = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ readPtr = 1
        /\ writePtr = 1

Next == \/ /\ writePtr' = (writePtr % N) + 1
          /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![writePtr] = 0]
        \/ /\ readPtr' = (readPtr % N) + 1
          /\ buffer' = buffer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, readPtr, writePtr>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----

        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

    /\ occupied = 0

       /\ cars' = Tail(cars)
       /\ occupied' = occupied - 1

Init ==
  /\ proposers = {}
  /\ acceptors = {}
  /\ learners = {}
  /\ proposals = [p \in proposers |-> <<>>]
  /\ acceptances = [a \in acceptors |-> <<>>]
  /\ learnings = [l \in learners |-> <<>>]

Propose(p, v) ==
  /\ p \in proposers
  /\ proposals' = [proposals EXCEPT ![p] = Append(proposals[p], v)]
  /\ acceptances' = acceptances
  /\ learnings' = learnings

Accept(a, v) ==
  /\ a \in acceptors
  /\ acceptances' = [acceptances EXCEPT ![a] = Append(acceptances[a], v)]
  /\ proposals' = proposals
  /\ learnings' = learnings

Learn(l, v) ==
  /\ l \in learners
  /\ learnings' = [learnings EXCEPT ![l] = Append(learnings[l], v)]
  /\ proposals

    /\ \A i \in 1..N: forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = Right(i)

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, cs

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ cs \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ cs' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ cs' = IF token' = cs THEN cs ELSE IF token' = cs THEN token' ELSE cs

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, cs>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ClockSynchronisation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] \in 1..N
        /\ epsilon \in 1..N

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + 1]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = (clocks[i] + 1) \div 2]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE DekkersAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == /\ turn' \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants' \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ (turn' = turn /\ wants' = wants)
        \/ (turn' = 1 - turn /\ wants' = <<TRUE, FALSE>>)
        \/ (turn' = 1 - turn /\ wants' = <<FALSE, TRUE>>)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

---- MODULE ReadersWriters ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer = 0

Next == \/ /\ writer = 0
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
          /\ writer' = writer
        \/ /\ writer = 0
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
          /\ writer' = writer
        \/ /\ writer = 0
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer>>

====
