spec_preview:
---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, IDs

ASSUME
  /\ N \in Nat
  /\ N >= 1
  /\ IDs \subseteq Nat
  /\ Cardinality(IDs) = N
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: i \in IDs

VARIABLES leader, ids

Init == 
  /\ ids = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
  /\ leader = 0

Next == 
  /\ leader' = \E i \in 1..N: i \in ids /\ i > leader
  /\ ids' = ids

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<leader, ids>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ResourceAlloc ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES procState, owner, requests, releases
\* 0: Not requested
\* 1: Requested
\* 2: Acquired
\* 3: Released

\* TypeOK ensures all variables have the correct type
TypeOK ==
  /\ owner \in Nat
  /\ procState \in [Nat -> Nat]
  /\ requests \in SUBSET Nat
  /\ releases \in SUBSET Nat

\* Init action
Init ==
  /\ owner = 0
  /\ procState = [p \in Nat |-> 0]
  /\ requests = {}
  /\ releases = {}

\* Next action
Next ==
  \/ \* A process requests the resource
     /\ \E p \in Nat : /\ ~(p \in requests)
                      /\ procState[p] = 0
                      /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p] = 1]
                      /\ requests' = requests \cup {p}
                      /\ owner' = owner

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, flag

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ flag \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ \A i \in {1, 2} : flag[i] = FALSE

Next == 
    /\ \E i \in {1, 2} :
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 3 - i
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ \A j \in {1, 2} \ {i} : flag'[j] = flag[j]
    /\ \E i \in {1, 2} :
        /\ flag[i] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, flag>>

====

        /\ turn' = 0
            /\ flag' = [x \in {0, 1} |-> IF x = 0 THEN 1 ELSE flag[x]]
        \/ /\ turn' = 1
            /\ flag' = [x \in {0, 1} |-> IF x = 1 THEN 1 ELSE flag[x]]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
            /\ flag' = [x \in {0, 1} |-> IF x = 0 THEN 0 ELSE IF x = 1 THEN 0 ELSE flag[x]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, flag>>

---- MODULE Counter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE counter

(* CONSTANTS *)
CONSTANT MAX

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ counter \in Nat
          /\ counter <= MAX

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ counter = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == /\ counter' = counter + 1
          /\ counter' <= MAX

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counter>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE MultiProducerConsumer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES buffer, bufferSize, producers, consumer

Init == /\ bufferSize \in Nat
        /\ bufferSize > 0
        /\ buffer \in Seq(1..bufferSize)
        /\ buffer = <<>>
        /\ producers \in Nat
        /\ producers > 0
        /\ consumer \in Nat
        /\ consumer > 0

ProducerAction == /\ bufferSize > Len(buffer)
                 /\ buffer' = Append(buffer, 1)

ConsumerAction == /\ Len(buffer) > 0
                 /\ buffer' = Tail(buffer)

Next == /\ bufferSize \in Nat
        /\ bufferSize > 0
        /\ buffer \in Seq(1..bufferSize)
        /\ buffer' \in Seq(1..bufferSize)
        /\ (\/ ProducerAction
            \/ ConsumerAction)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, bufferSize, producers, consu

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ClockSynchronisation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, drift, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ drift \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ epsilon \in Int
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = 0
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : drift[i] = 0
        /\ epsilon = 0

Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = clocks[i] + drift[i]
        /\ drift' = [i \in 1..N |-> drift[i] + (IF i = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0)]
        /\ epsilon' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, drift, epsilon>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, MaxCS

VARIABLES token, cs

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ cs \in 1..MaxCS

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ cs' \in 1..MaxCS
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ cs' = IF token' = 1 THEN 1 ELSE cs + 1
        /\ token' = token
           /\ cs' = cs
        /\ token' = token
           /\ cs' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE cs + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, cs>>

====

---- MODULE MultiProducerConsumer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES buffer, maxSize, producers, consumer

Init == 
  /\ buffer = <<>>
  /\ maxSize = 10
  /\ producers = {1, 2, 3}
  /\ consumer = 1

ProducerAction(p) == 
  /\ p \in producers
  /\ Len(buffer) < maxSize
  /\ buffer' = Append(buffer, p)

ConsumerAction == 
  /\ Len(buffer) > 0
  /\ buffer' = Tail(buffer)

Next == 
  \/ \E p \in producers: ProducerAction(p)
  \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, maxSize, producers, consumer>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES buffer, readPtr, writePtr

Init == /\ buffer = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ readPtr = 1
        /\ writePtr = 1

Next == /\ writePtr' = IF writePtr = N THEN 1 ELSE writePtr + 1
        /\ buffer' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = writePtr THEN 1 ELSE buffer[i]]
        /\ readPtr' = IF readPtr = N THEN 1 ELSE readPtr + 1
        /\ buffer' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = readPtr THEN 0 ELSE buffer[i]]
        /\ readPtr' = IF readPtr = N THEN 1 ELSE readPtr + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, readPtr, writePtr>>

====

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] \in 1..N

Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks'[i] \in 1..N
          /\ clocks'[i] = (clocks[i] + \A j \in 1..N : (clocks[j] - clocks[i]) \div N) + \A j \in 1..N : (j - i) \div N
        /\ epsilon' \in Nat
        /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE MultiProducerConsumer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES buffer, bufferSize, producers, consumer

Init == /\ bufferSize \in Nat
        /\ bufferSize > 0
        /\ buffer \in Seq(1..bufferSize)
        /\ buffer = <<>>
        /\ producers \in Nat
        /\ producers > 0
        /\ consumer \in Nat
        /\ consumer > 0

ProducerAction == /\ bufferSize \in Nat
                 /\ bufferSize > 0
                 /\ buffer \in Seq(1..bufferSize)
                 /\ bufferSize = Len(buffer) + 1
                 /\ buffer' = Append(buffer, 1)

ConsumerAction == /\ bufferSize \in Nat
                 /\ bufferSize > 0
                 /\ buffer \in Seq(1..bufferSize)
                 /\ bufferSize = Len(buffer) - 1
                 /\ buffer' = Tail(buffer)

        /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[0], wants[1]>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PetersonsAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

---- MODULE Door ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES doorState, doorLock

(* --CONSTANTS DoorState, DoorLock --*)

DoorState == {"Open", "Closed", "Locked"}
DoorLock == {"Unlocked", "Locked"}

DoorStateType == doorState \in DoorState
DoorLockType == doorLock \in DoorLock

TypeOK == DoorStateType /\ DoorLockType

Init == /\ doorState = "Closed"
        /\ doorLock = "Unlocked"

Next == \/ /\ doorState' = "Open"
          /\ doorLock' = doorLock
          /\ doorState = "Closed"
          /\ doorLock = "Unlocked"
      \/ /\ doorState' = "Closed"
          /\ doorLock' = "Unlocked"
          /\ doorState = "Open"
      \/ /\ doorState' = "Locked"
          /\ doorLock' = "Locked"
          /\ doorState = "Closed"
          /\ doorLock = "Unlocked"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

(* --state variables
*)

(* --state transition



  fi
elif state = "Green" then



  fi
elif state = "Yellow" then



  fi
fi
*)

(* --type invariant
TypeOK == /\ state \in {"Red", "Green", "Yellow"}
          /\ timer \in Nat
*)

(* --specification
Init == /\ state = "Red"
        /\ timer = 0
Next == /\ state' \in {"Red", "Green", "Yellow"}
        /\ timer' \in Nat
        /\ IF state = "Red" THEN
               /\ state' = "Green"
               /\ timer' = 0
               /\ state' = "Red"
               /\ timer' = timer + 1
             FI
           ELSEIF state = "Green" THEN

               /\ state' = "Yellow"
               /\ timer' = 0
               /\ state' = "Green"

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Door ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES doorState, doorLock

(* --type definition -- *)
DoorState == {"Open", "Closed", "Locked"}

(* --constants -- *)
DoorStates == {"Open", "Closed", "Locked"}

(* --initialization -- *)
Init == /\ doorState \in DoorStates
        /\ doorLock \in DoorStates

(* --next-state relation -- *)
Next == \/ /\ doorState' = "Open"
          /\ doorLock' = doorLock
          /\ doorState = "Closed"
        \/ /\ doorState' = "Closed"
          /\ doorLock' = doorLock
          /\ doorState = "Open"
        \/ /\ doorState' = "Locked"
          /\ doorLock' = "Locked"
          /\ doorState = "Closed"

(* --specification -- *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<doorState, doorLock>>

(* --type invariants -- *)
TypeOK == /\ doorState \in Door

---- MODULE VendingMachine ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES balance, inventory

(* Constants *)
ITEM_PRICE == 5
MAX_BALANCE == 20

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == /\ balance \in 0..MAX_BALANCE
          /\ inventory \in [1..MAX_BALANCE -> 0..MAX_BALANCE]
          /\ \A i \in 1..MAX_BALANCE : inventory[i] \in 0..MAX_BALANCE

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ balance = 0
        /\ inventory = [i \in 1..MAX_BALANCE |-> 10]

(* Actions *)
InsertCoin == /\ balance' = balance + 1
             /\ inventory' = inventory
             /\ balance' <= MAX_BALANCE

DispenseItem == /\ balance' = balance - ITEM_PRICE
               /\ inventory' = [i \in 1..MAX_BALANCE |-> IF i = 1 THEN inventory[i] - 1 ELSE inventory[i]]
               /\ balance >= ITEM_PRICE
               /\ inv

spec_preview:
---- MODULE MultiProducerConsumer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES buffer, bufferSize, producers, consumer

Init == /\ bufferSize \in Nat
        /\ bufferSize > 0
        /\ buffer \in Seq(1..bufferSize)
        /\ buffer = <<>>
        /\ producers \in Nat
        /\ producers > 0
        /\ consumer \in Nat
        /\ consumer > 0

Producer(i) == /\ i \in 1..producers
              /\ bufferSize > Len(buffer)
              /\ buffer' = Append(buffer, i)

Consumer == /\ Len(buffer) > 0
           /\ buffer' = Tail(buffer)

Next == \E i \in 1..producers : Producer(i)
        \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, bufferSize, producers, consumer>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, CS

VARIABLES token, cs

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ cs \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ cs' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ cs' = IF token' = cs THEN cs ELSE IF token' = cs THEN token ELSE cs

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, cs>>

====

---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, IDs
ASSUME
  /\ N \in Nat
  /\ IDs \subseteq Nat
  /\ Len(IDs) = N
  /\ IsFiniteSet(IDs)

VARIABLES leader, seq, ids

Init == 
  /\ leader = 0
  /\ seq = <<>>
  /\ ids = IDs

Next == 
  /\ seq' = Append(seq, leader)
  /\ leader' = Max(ids)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<leader, seq, ids>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE SimpleCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

Init ==
  /\ participants = <<1, 2, 3>> \* Example with 3 participants
  /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
  /\ decision = "unknown"

Next ==
  \/ /\ \E p \in participants : /\ votes[p] = "unknown"
      /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
      /\ decision' = decision
  \/ /\ \E p \in participants : /\ votes[p] = "unknown"
      /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
      /\ decision' = decision
  \/ /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "yes"
      /\ decision = "unknown"
      /\ decision' = "commit"
      /\ votes' = votes
  \/ /\ \E p \in participants : votes[p] = "no"
      /\ decision = "unknown"
      /\ decision' = "abort"
      /\ votes' = votes
  \/ /\

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ClockSynchronisation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: clocks[i] \in 1..N

Next == /\ epsilon' \in Nat
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = (clocks[i] + \A j \in 1..N: (clocks[j] - clocks[i])) \div N]
        /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>>

====

---- MODULE MultiProducerConsumer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES buffer, producers, consumer

Init ==
  /\ buffer = <<>>
  /\ producers = <<>>
  /\ consumer = 0

Next ==
  \/ /\ producers' = <<>>
     /\ consumer' = consumer + 1
     /\ buffer' = Append(buffer, consumer)
  \/ /\ consumer' = consumer
     /\ buffer' = Tail(buffer)
     /\ producers' = Append(producers, consumer)

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, producers, consumer>>

====

                 /\ cs' = cs
                    /\ token' \in 1..N
                       /\ token' = token
                          /\ cs' = cs
                             /\ token' \in 1..N
                                /\ token' = token
                                   /\ cs' = cs
                                      /\ token' \in 1..N
                                         /\ token' = token
                                            /\ cs' = cs

---- MODULE Peterson ----

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ flag \in {0,1}^2
        /\ flag = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = 1, ![1] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = 0, ![1] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, flag>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE DekkersAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0, 1} |-> 0]

Next == /\ turn' \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants' \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ (turn' = 1 - turn
            /\ wants' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 1 ELSE 0])
        \/ (turn' = turn
            /\ wants' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 0 ELSE wants[i]])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES buffer, readPtr, writePtr

Init == /\ buffer \in [1..N -> 0]
        /\ readPtr \in 1..N
        /\ writePtr \in 1..N
        /\ readPtr = 1
        /\ writePtr = 1

Next == \/ /\ writePtr = readPtr
          /\ buffer[writePtr] = 0
          /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![writePtr] = 1]
          /\ readPtr' = readPtr
          /\ writePtr' = IF writePtr = N THEN 1 ELSE writePtr + 1
        \/ /\ writePtr # readPtr
          /\ buffer' = buffer
          /\ readPtr' = readPtr
          /\ writePtr' = writePtr

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, readPtr, writePtr>>

====

---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, flag

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ flag \in {0, 1} \X {0, 1}

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [x \in {0, 1} |-> IF x = 0 THEN 1 ELSE flag[x]]
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ flag' = [x \in {0, 1} |-> IF x = 1 THEN 1 ELSE flag[x]]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = [x \in {0, 1} |-> IF x = 0 THEN 0 ELSE IF x = 1 THEN 0 ELSE flag[x]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, flag>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, Node

VARIABLE c

Init == c \in [Node -> 0 .. M - 1]

CreateToken == /\ c[0] = c[N - 1]
              /\ c' = [c EXCEPT ![0] = (c[N - 1] + 1) % M]

PassToken(i) == /\ i /= 0
               /\ c[i] /= c[i - 1]
               /\ c' = [c EXCEPT ![i] = c[i - 1]]

Next == CreateToken \/ \E i \in Node : PassToken(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_c

TypeOK == /\ c \in [Node -> 0 .. M - 1]

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE DekkersAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = <<0, 0>>

Next == /\ turn' \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants' \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ (turn' = turn \/ turn' = 1 - turn)
        /\ (wants' = wants \/ wants' = <<1, 0>> \/ wants' = <<0, 1>> \/ wants' = <<1, 1>>)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE MultiProducerConsumer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet

VARIABLES buffer, bufferSize, producers, consumer

Init == /\ bufferSize \in Nat
        /\ bufferSize > 0
        /\ buffer \in Seq(0..bufferSize)
        /\ buffer = <<>> 
        /\ producers \in FiniteSet
        /\ consumer \in Nat

Next == \/ /\ bufferSize \in Nat
          /\ bufferSize > 0
          /\ buffer \in Seq(0..bufferSize)
          /\ buffer = <<>> 
          /\ producers \in FiniteSet
          /\ consumer \in Nat
        \/ /\ bufferSize \in Nat
          /\ bufferSize > 0
          /\ buffer \in Seq(0..bufferSize)
          /\ buffer \in Seq(0..bufferSize)
          /\ bufferSize > Len(buffer)
          /\ buffer' = Append(buffer, 0)
          /\ bufferSize' = bufferSize

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, flag

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ flag = [i \in {0, 1} |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = 0 THEN TRUE ELSE flag[i]]
          /\ flag' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE flag[i]]
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ flag' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE flag[i]]
          /\ flag' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = 0 THEN TRUE ELSE flag[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, flag>>
